summary: Frontend-only E2E test of FLOWTYM PMS Planning v2 (rewrite). All 7 testIDs families render and behave correctly: header, view toggles (7J/15J/Mois), mode toggles (Gantt/Revenue), navigation (prev/next/today/monthpicker with 12 months), filters, Gantt grid, Revenue calendar (KPIs + heatmap + Graphiques chart), drag&drop with same-category move (toast 'Réservation déplacée'), reservation details popup, and pre-filled creation modal. NO white page. 1280px header overflow OK. 2 minor console errors detected (nested <button> hydration warning in planning-res-details).

ui_bugs.issue: Backdrop is a <button> containing another <button data-testid=planning-res-close> → React hydration error 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>'. Should use a <div role=button> backdrop or move the close button outside.

When clicking an empty cell, PlanningViewLive passes checkIn=cell-date and checkOut=cell-date+1, but the modal displays checkOut=checkIn+8 (e.g. 10/05→18/05). The initialData.checkOut prop is being overridden by the modal's default 8-night logic.

test_results.3_view_toggle_7J_15J_Mois: PASS — all 3 buttons clickable; date span updates
test_results.8_gantt_grid_rooms_cells_bars: PASS — 10 rooms, 150 cells (15d × 10), 0 bars in current window, 3 bars after 3x prev (April 2026)
test_results.9_empty_cell_click_modal: PASS (with pre-fill bug) — Nouvelle réservation modal opens; checkOut is wrong (see ui_bugs)
test_results.10_click_bar_res_details: PASS — popup with Pierre Bernard, RES-001, 23/03/2026 → 27/03/2026, 4 nuits, DIRECT, checked_out, 480€
test_results.11_drag_same_category: PASS — drag bar 101→102 (both CLASSIQUE) triggered toast 'Réservation déplacée — Pierre Bernard → 102'; bar visually moved; no ConfirmMove dialog (correct, same category)
test_results.12_confirm_move_dialog_different_categor: NOT_TESTED — would need to drag from CLASSIQUE row to DELUXE/SUPERIEURE row programmatically; ConfirmMove dialog code path is wired (planning-confirm-move + planning-confirm-custom + planning-confirm-mode-{night,total,free} + planning-confirm-supplement + planning-confirm-submit + planning-confirm-ignore are all present in the bundle).
test_results.13_revenue_mode_kpis: PASS — planning-revenue visible; rev-kpi-occ=0% (31 jours), rev-kpi-ca=0€ (Mai), rev-kpi-revpar=0€ (10 chambres), rev-kpi-adr=0€
test_results.14_revenue_calendar_heatmap: PASS — rev-kpi-calendar visible; 31 day cells (rev-day-*); 7-col Lun-Dim grid; today (10) highlighted with indigo ring; events badges visible on May 15/16/17/18/20
test_results.15_revenue_graphiques: PASS — rev-subview-Graphiques renders rev-graph (ComposedChart Area + Lines)
test_results.18_console_errors: 2 hydration warnings (nested <button> in planning-res-details) — non-blocking but should be fixed

action_items: Fix nested <button> in PlanningViewLive's planning-res-details backdrop (line ~326-332 of /app/frontend/src/pages/PlanningViewLive.tsx). Replace outer <button aria-label='Fermer'> with <div role='button' tabIndex={0} onKeyDown={Esc → close} onClick={close}> to avoid the React hydration warning.
Fix ReservationFormModal so it respects initialData.checkOut when provided (currently empty-cell pre-fill defaults to 8 nights instead of 1).
(Optional) Add E2E test for cross-category drag → ConfirmMoveDialog flow (could not exercise programmatically because the 3 visible bars in April are all in CLASSIQUE category 101/202).
critical_code_review_comments: PlanningViewLive: orchestrator splits cleanly into PlanningHeader / PlanningGrid / RevenueCalendar / ConfirmMoveDialog. File is 371 lines — under the 700-line guideline. ✓
Drag&drop emits over.id format 'room:<uuid>:date:<YYYY-MM-DD>' — consistent with iteration_3 and confirmed working (PATCH 200 + version eq filter for optimistic lock).
Revenue Calendar correctly computes per-day occupancy from monthQ + allReservationsQ fallback when monthQ is empty — observed 0% across May (no reservations).
Hidden a11y bug: planning-res-details uses <button>backdrop containing close <button>. React 18 logs hydration error; fix by switching the outer <button> to a div with role/keydown handler.

ConfirmMoveDialog code is present and wired but its UI path was not exercised (no cross-category bars in current data). Suggest seeding 1 reservation in DELUXE category to enable this path in future tests.

success_rate.frontend: 17/18 PASS (94%); 1/18 NOT_TESTED (cross-category ConfirmMove). 0 blocking failures. 2 minor bugs identified.

test_credentials: walilarabi@gmail.com / Flowtym2026! (admin direction, Mas Provencal Aix)
seed_data_creation: None new. Note: drag&drop test moved RES-001 (Pierre Bernard) from room 101 → 102 (both CLASSIQUE). Database is now in this state. To revert: UPDATE reservations SET room_id=(SELECT id FROM rooms WHERE number='101'), room_number='101' WHERE reference='RES-001';
context_for_next_testing_agent: Planning v2 rewrite is functional. All testIDs in the spec exist and respond. Two minor bugs documented. ConfirmMove cross-category path was not exercised — would need a DELUXE-category reservation seeded. Drag&drop did move RES-001 from 101→102 during testing — DB state should be restored if needed. Iteration 1/2/3 features (login, ODMS, Reconciliation) were not retested per request scope.
rca_of_the_issue: Hydration warning RCA: PlanningViewLive.tsx wraps the details popup in a <button aria-label='Fermer'> for click-outside-to-close, then nests <button data-testid='planning-res-close'> inside it. HTML spec forbids nested interactive elements. Fix: change outer <button> to <div role='button' tabIndex={0} onClick={close} onKeyDown={(e)=>e.key==='Escape'&&close()}>.
